◆ SECURITY CHECK ◆

Enter access password to gain higher clearance:

ACCESS DENIED - INVALID CREDENTIALS
BASE DIAGNOSTIC
SCAN BUS: STANDBY
GATE STABILITY // DUAL TRACECAL
SHAREHOLDER VALUE // PROJECTIONROI
TACTICAL SWEEP // RADARPING
ENTITY NOISE // SPECTRUMSYNC
BIOSCAN ARRAY // VITALS SUBJ-01 BIO
REACTOR // CONTAINMENT // SYNCRESERVE
ANOMALY TOMOGRAPHY // FIELDCHECK
LIVE EVENT LOG // DIAGNOSTICSFEED
SIGNAL STRENGTHLOCK
UPLINK // PROCESSOR LOADPROC
AWAITING SENSOR BUS [ ESC CLOSE ]
TOPOGRAPHY
TACTICAL MAP BUS: STANDBY
ARES // BLACK DESERT
TACTICAL MAP RUNTIME
TACTICAL MAP BUS: STANDBY
MAP STANDBY 

                    

                    

                    

                    

                    

                    

                

            

            

                TACTICAL MAP WAITING
                [ ESC CLOSE ]

 DB ONLINE

                            
 EXT SECURE
